summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that she was featured in an Israeli newspaper discussing the Occupy movement. She links to the Hebrew-language article and asks readers who can read Hebrew to tell her how the coverage reads. The post is essentially a call for translation help from her audience.
key_points: O'Neil was covered by an Israeli financial newspaper (Calcalist) for her work with Occupy
She cannot read Hebrew herself and relies on her community for translation
The post demonstrates her ongoing public engagement with the Occupy movement internationally
money_quotes: I got covered in an Israeli newspaper talking about Occupy.
If you can read Hebrew, please tell me how it reads.
key_insight: O'Neil's work with Occupy Wall Street garnered international media attention, reaching audiences beyond the English-speaking world.
